org: AI/ML Club, National Forensic Sciences University
description: I helped kickstart the AI/ML Club to create a space where we could build and break things together. It's been incredibly rewarding to grow a community of peers who just want to tinker, learn, and share knowledge.
highlights: Manage the DataCamp classroom to provide accessible learning resources for the university community.
Organize hands-on workshops and live programming sessions to bridge the gap between theory and actual code.
Designed and hosted original Capture-the-Flag (CTF) challenges focusing on AI/ML and Cryptography to gamify learning.
